channel.title: AI Briefing
channel.description: Daily AI news briefing — the top three stories from the last 24 hours.
channel.itunes:author: Robert Dawson
channel.itunes:summary: A daily, fully-automated AI news podcast

item.title: AI Briefing — May 16, 2026
item.description:
Top 3 AI stories for 2026-05-16:
Chapters: 00:00:00 Intro 00:00:33 CMU benchmark shows frontier AI agents... 00:01:46 OpenClaw founder spends $1.3M monthly... 00:02:52 ArXiv will ban authors one year for fully... 00:03:48 Outro
Sources: 1. Research Breakthrough: CMU benchmark shows frontier AI agents autonomously developing real browser exploits Source: https://the-decoder.com/new-benchmark-shows-claude-mythos-and-gpt-5-5-can-develop-real-browser-exploits-autonomously/ 2. Product & Tool Watch: OpenClaw founder spends $1.3M monthly running 100 parallel AI coding agents Source: https://the-decoder.com/for-1-3-million-a-month-openclaw-founder-peter-steinberger-runs-100-ai-agents-that-code-review-prs-and-find-bugs/ Source: https://twitter.com/steipete/status/2055346265869721905 Source: https://simonwillison.net/2026/May/16/openclaw-names/#atom-everything 3. Policy & Regulation Watch: ArXiv will ban authors one year for fully AI-generated paper submissions Source: https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/16/research-repository-arxiv-will-ban-authors-for-a-year-if-they-let-ai-do-all-the-work/
item.podcast:soundbite: CMU benchmark shows frontier AI agents...

item.title: AI Briefing — May 12, 2026
item.description:
Top 3 AI stories for 2026-05-12:
Chapters: 00:00:00 Intro 00:00:26 Google unveils Gemini Intelligence and... 00:02:17 Microsoft ousts Israel chief after Azure... 00:04:04 Mira Murati's Thinking Machines ships... 00:05:44 Outro
Sources: 1. Top Story: Google unveils Gemini Intelligence and AI-first Android overhaul ahead of I/O Source: https://www.theverge.com/tech/928724/gemini-intelligence-android-io-autofill Source: https://www.theverge.com/tech/928653/google-android-17-9-biggest-new-features-android-show-io Source: https://arstechnica.com/gadgets/2026/05/google-says-android-is-getting-a-big-ai-overhaul-in-2026/ Source: https://arstechnica.com/gadgets/2026/05/googles-android-powered-laptops-are-called-googlebooks-and-theyre-coming-this-year/ Source: https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/12/everything-google-announced-at-its-android-show-from-googlebooks-to-vibe-coded-widgets/ Source: https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/12/google-brings-agentic-ai-and-vibe-coded-widgets-to-android/ Source: https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/12/googles-create-my-widget-feature-will-let-you-vibe-code-your-own-widgets/ 2. Policy & Regulation Watch: Microsoft ousts Israel chief after Azure reportedly powered military AI targeting in Gaza Source: https://the-decoder.com/microsoft-ousts-its-israel-chief-following-reports-that-azure-quietly-powered-military-ai-targeting-in-gaza/ 3. Research Breakthrough: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines ships first model with parallel real-time interaction Source: https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/928309/mira-murati-thinking-machines-ai-interaction-model Source: https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/11/thinking-machines-wants-to-build-an-ai-that-actually-listens-while-it-talks/ Source: https://the-decoder.com/thinking-machines-lab-ships-its-first-model-and-argues-interactivity-is-what-openai-gets-wrong-about-voice/
item.podcast:soundbite: Microsoft ousts Israel chief after Azure...

item.title: AI Briefing — May 11, 2026
item.description:
Top 3 AI stories for 2026-05-11:
1. Top Story: Google Confirms First AI-Built Zero-Day Exploit in the Wild 2. AI Business Watch: OpenAI Launches DeployCo to Embed Models in Enterprise Workflows 3. Research Breakthrough: Baidu's Ernie 5.1 Claims 94 Percent Cheaper Pre-Training

item.title: AI Briefing — May 10, 2026
item.description:
Top 3 AI stories for 2026-05-10:
1. Autonomous Hacking Agents Jump From 6% to 81% 2. GPT-5.5 Real Costs Rise 49 to 92 Percent 3. Detecting Models That Sandbag Safety Tests

item.title: AI Briefing — May 9, 2026
item.description:
Top 3 AI stories for 2026-05-09:
1. Anthropic's $900B valuation and the AI capital squeeze 2. Broadcom wants Microsoft to co-sign OpenAI's chip 3. Anthropic on teaching Claude the why, not just the what

item.title: AI Briefing — May 8, 2026
item.description:
Top 3 AI stories for 2026-05-08:
1. Claude Mythos finds 271 unknown Firefox vulnerabilities 2. Anthropic catches Claude faking its reasoning traces 3. OpenAI brings GPT-5 reasoning to real-time voice

item.title: AI Briefing — May 7, 2026
item.description:
Top 3 AI stories for 2026-05-07:
1. Anthropic taps SpaceX's Colossus-1, doubles Claude Code limits, and teaches Claude to dream 2. OpenAI's MRC protocol, co-built with AMD, Broadcom, Intel, Microsoft, and NVIDIA 3. Google ships multi-token drafters making Gemma 4 up to 3x faster

item.title: AI Briefing — May 6, 2026
item.description:
Top 3 AI stories for 2026-05-06:
1. Anthropic takes over Colossus-1 2. OpenAI's open MRC networking protocol 3. Gemma 4 gets 3x faster with speculative decoding

item.title: AI Briefing — May 5, 2026
item.description:
Top 3 AI stories for 2026-05-05:
1. US moves toward pre-deployment review of frontier models 2. Researchers gaslight Claude into producing forbidden content 3. Nature retracts influential ChatGPT-in-education study
